action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 19 finished training 5 epochs (run_epoch1-5.pt). The best-ever eval is still rmse_z500=1018.63 from iteration 5. We have only ~9.7 minutes remaining. The new epochs have val_loss 0.117-0.121, comparable to the iter 5 model. Analysis: A single epoch might match the prior best, but averaging weights of multiple epochs from the same training run (a model soup) can yield a more robust predictor without requiring multiple forward passes at inference. We will quickly soup epochs 1,2,4,5 (excluding the overfit epoch 3) and submit it. If time remains, we will test an individual epoch as a fallback.
